name: Spicy Stir Fried Fish
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup bamboo shoots, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak mushrooms for 10 minutes in warm water, drain, and chop.
2. Heat oil in a wok until very hot.
3. Add fish to the hot oil and fry until lightly browned. Remove the fish to a warm dish and pour off all but 2 tablespoons of oil.
4. In the same wok, add tomato sauce, red pepper flakes, bamboo shoots, and mushrooms. Cook, stirring for 3-4 minutes, until the mushrooms soften.
5. Add rice wine, sugar, salt, and soy sauce to the pan. Stir the mixture for 30 seconds.
6. Return the fish to the pan and turn it over in the sauce.
7. Dissolve cornstarch in 1 tablespoon water and stir into the wok.
8. Cook until the sauce thickens gently.
9. Pour the contents of the wok into a serving dish and garnish with chopped green onions.
